base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_8_dark_land — a tile (level_layout) from 1988 super mario bros 3. World 8 — Castle of Koopa/Dark Land. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: World 8 — Castle of Koopa/Dark Land; final world, Bowser's fortress
